response.text: Strong complaint density meets solid demand in a moderately uncrowded field with low ad spend.

parsed.text: Strong complaint density (0.80 pctile, 200+ reviews citing battery life and noise) meets solid, mildly accelerating demand in a moderately uncrowded field with low ad spend — both interaction terms lifted the base.
